channel.title: Camping on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Camping on Alien Truth Social

item.title: UFO Watchtower
item.description:
The UFO Watchtower, located north of Hooper, Colorado, is an observation platform and campground that opened in May 2000. It was established by cattle farmer Judy Messoline, who converted her barn into a tourist attraction to capitalize on reported UFO sightings in the San Luis Valley. The attraction relies on donations and sales of alien-themed merchandise for funding. Over 30,000 visitors have reportedly visited the Watchtower since its opening, with reported sightings and a “healing garden” also being features.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_Watchtower
